disclaimer: Educational assessment. CARSI is an IICRC-approved CEC provider; this is CARSI-original Australian training, not IICRC certification.
note: Australian-produced. Grounded in the course's own modules. Founder to review before wiring live.

quizzes.title: CARSI Trauma & Biohazard Decontamination Practitioner — Knowledge Check

questions.questionText: Under standard (universal) precautions, blood and body fluids should be treated as…
Before starting trauma decontamination you must prepare…
options: A risk assessment and Safe Work Method Statement
Full — including respiratory, skin and eye protection with non-permeable barriers

questions.questionText: Biohazard and clinical waste must be…
options: Contained and disposed of lawfully through approved waste streams

questions.questionText: Duty of care on a trauma job includes…
options: Discretion, dignity and respect for those affected

questions.questionText: Psychological safety of the technician is…
options: A real consideration to plan for and support
